title: Trust, Discovery & Autonomy in the Age of Agentic AI | EG Galano at Agentic Zero
description: EG Galano, from DIN and Infura, discusses how the company is evolving from a centralized RPC provider to building DIN (Decentralized Infrastructure Network), a generalized marketplace protocol that addresses discovery, trust, and payment challenges emerging with AI agents and MCP APIs that plagued Web3 infrastructure for the past decade.
